explanation: The original command line is already a true positive for the Sigma rule. No mutation is needed to trigger the rule.
Inserted quotes around the file path to test if the rule is sensitive to quoted command-line arguments.
Added trailing space to test if the rule is sensitive to whitespace in the command line.
Appended a trailing backslash to test if the rule is sensitive to malformed or normalized paths.
Appended a trailing dash to test if the rule is sensitive to trailing characters or flags.
